svg.title: Customer Support Executive — system architecture with PostgreSQL
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: Streamlit UI feeds into a LangGraph orchestrator with an intent router, which fans out to three agents that call through an MCP server exposing two tools, backed by PostgreSQL and FAISS data stores populated by a SQL setup script and PDF ingestion script.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Streamlit UI layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the SQL agent')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Policy RAG agent')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the answer synthesizer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PostgreSQL database schema')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the FAISS vector store')
